data.title: SEK 2 billion notes issued by Municipality Finance under MTN programme.
data.description: A recent report reveals that the unemployment rate in the United States has dropped to 4.2%, the lowest it has been in over a year. This news comes as a relief to many, particularly as the country continues to recover from the economic impacts of the pandemic. The report also shows that the economy added 531,000 jobs in the past month, beating expectations and pointing to a positive trend in the job market. Additionally, it highlights that the labor force participation rate has increased to 61.8%, indicating more people are actively seeking employment. Overall, these numbers reflect a promising outlook for the economy and job market in the United States.

data.title: Kolosso Toyota in Appleton, WI sold to Kocourek Automotive. Performance Brokerage Services facilitated the sale.
data.description: Leading dealership buy-sell facilitator, Performance Brokerage Services, has revealed the successful sale of Kolosso Toyota in Appleton, Wisconsin. The dealership was acquired from Bill and Barb Kolosso by Keith Kocourek of Kocourek Automotive. This transaction, finalized on October 10, 2025 in Irvine, California, marks a significant milestone in the automotive industry. Performance Brokerage Services continues to demonstrate its influence in dealership transactions across the North, showcasing a lucrative deal involving key players in the market.

data.title: Berlin Heals completes Phase I study enrollment for CMIC-III Less Invasive Study; expect 6-month data in 2026, enabling out-patient implants.
data.description: Enrollment for the initial phase of the first human study for a less invasive approach has been finalized. The study is anticipated to unveil the 6-month data results in 2026 at a prominent cardiology congress. Through this less invasive technique, a higher number of cardiologists may be able to undertake outpatient procedures. Moreover, further research is in the pipeline to broaden the range of applications and enhance the supporting evidence.

data.title: Foundever® opens 1st offshore CX hub in Luxor, Egypt. Dr. Amr Talaat attends opening ceremony.
data.description: On October 10, 2025, Foundever®, a renowned provider of customer experience (CX) solutions, inaugurated its new contact center in Luxor, Egypt. This facility represents the company's inaugural offshore CX hub in Upper Egypt. The event saw the presence of Dr. Amr Talaat, reaffirming the significance of this development.

data.title: Reporter David Yaffe-Bellany dives into crypto coverage, immersing in the industry since 2022, adapting on the go.
data.description: David Yaffe-Bellany, an experienced technology journalist who has been reporting on the cryptocurrency sector since 2022, has adapted to the concept of continuous learning and evolving within his field.

data.title: US stock futures trading higher. Apogee Enterprises up 1.4% to $42 in after-hours. Levi Strauss reports upbeat Q3 earnings.
data.description: Investor attention may be on Apogee Enterprises Inc. (NASDAQ: APOG) and Levi Strauss & Co. (NYSE: LEVI) today, as U.S. stock futures are trading higher on Friday morning. Apogee Enterprises Inc. exceeded second-quarter financial expectations with their results post-closing bell on Thursday, causing a 1.4% increase in their shares to $42.00 in after-hours trading. Levi Strauss & Co. reported positive third-quarter earnings and revised its FY2025 outlook... Detailed information can be found on financial news platform Benzinga.com.
